[et_pb_section fb_built="1" _builder_version="4.23.4" _module_preset="default" use_background_color_gradient="on" background_color_gradient_repeat="on" background_color_gradient_stops="rgba(9,9,21,0) 0%|#090915 100%" background_image="https://diviplus.io/wp-content/uploads/2024/01/gradient-bg-purple.webp?_t=1704449912" background_enable_pattern_style="on" background_pattern_style="inverted-chevrons-2" background_pattern_transform="flip_horizontal" background_pattern_size="custom" background_pattern_width="5px" background_pattern_repeat_origin="center" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_row _builder_version="4.23.4" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_column type="4_4" _builder_version="4.23.4" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_text admin_label="21st Century Innovations" _builder_version="4.23.4" _module_preset="default" text_text_color="#FFFFFF" header_2_font="Playfair Display|600|||||||" header_2_font_size="54px" text_orientation="center" background_layout="dark" global_colors_info="{}"]

21st Century Innovations

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][et_pb_row _builder_version="4.23.4" _module_preset="default" max_width="768px" max_width_tablet="768px" max_width_phone="768px" max_width_last_edited="on|desktop" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_column type="4_4" _builder_version="4.23.4" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"][dipl_timeline select_timeline_layout_option="dipl_timeline_right" global_timeline_icon_color="rgba(255,255,255,0.08)" global_icon_fill_color="#b330ff" global_timeline_icon_font_size="9px" global_icon_shape="use_circle" global_icon_shape_fill_color="rgba(255,255,255,0.08)" timeline_bar_size="5px" timeline_bar_color="#FFFFFF" timeline_bar_fill_color="#b330ff" _builder_version="4.23.4" _module_preset="default" global_timeline_header_text_color="#FFFFFF" global_timeline_header_font_size="24px" global_timeline_header_line_height="1.3em" global_timeline_text_text_color="#FFFFFF" global_timeline_text_font_size="16px" global_timeline_date_text_color="#FFFFFF" global_timeline_header_font_size_tablet="22px" global_timeline_header_font_size_phone="20px" global_timeline_header_font_size_last_edited="on|desktop" global_colors_info="{}"][dipl_timeline_item timeline_title="Emergence of Social Media" display_time="on" timeline_custom_time="Early 2000s" use_timeline_icon="on" select_timeline_icon="||fa||900" _builder_version="4.23.4" _module_preset="default" background_color="rgba(255,255,255,0.08)" background_enable_color="on" border_radii="on|15px|15px|15px|15px" global_colors_info="{}"]

Platforms like Facebook, Twitter, and YouTube revolutionized communication, connecting billions worldwide and reshaping the way people interact and share information.

[/dipl_timeline_item][dipl_timeline_item timeline_title="Introduction of the iPhone" display_time="on" timeline_custom_time="2007" use_timeline_icon="on" select_timeline_icon="||fa||900" _builder_version="4.23.4" _module_preset="default" background_color="rgba(255,255,255,0.08)" background_enable_color="on" border_radii="on|15px|15px|15px|15px" global_colors_info="{}"]

Apple's iPhone launch marked a paradigm shift in mobile technology, paving the way for smartphones that integrate communication, entertainment, and computing power in one device.

[/dipl_timeline_item][dipl_timeline_item timeline_title="Rise of Big Data and Cloud Technology" display_time="on" timeline_custom_time="Mid-2000s" use_timeline_icon="on" select_timeline_icon="||fa||900" _builder_version="4.23.4" _module_preset="default" background_color="rgba(255,255,255,0.08)" background_enable_color="on" border_radii="on|15px|15px|15px|15px" global_colors_info="{}"]Advancements in data storage, cloud computing, and analytics transformed industries, enabling large-scale data processing, storage, and accessibility.[/dipl_timeline_item][dipl_timeline_item timeline_title="AI and Automation Boom" display_time="on" timeline_custom_time="2010s - Present" use_timeline_icon="on" select_timeline_icon="||fa||900" _builder_version="4.23.4" _module_preset="default" background_color="rgba(255,255,255,0.08)" background_enable_color="on" border_radii="on|15px|15px|15px|15px" global_colors_info="{}"]Rapid advancements in artificial intelligence (AI) and automation are reshaping industries, from autonomous vehicles to machine learning applications, revolutionizing various sectors.[/dipl_timeline_item][/dipl_timeline][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section]
